product: Connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork (Beta) ​
tagline: June 16, 2026 You can now connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork through the Genie managed MCP server, so users can ask natural language questions about their Databricks data without leaving Copilo
what_it_does: June 16, 2026 You can now connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork through the Genie managed MCP server, so users can ask natural language questions about their Databricks data without leaving Copilot Cowork. See [Genie plugin for Microsoft Copilot Cowork](/aws/en/integrations/msft cowork).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
